phrases.intent_en: Ask about the flower market on this square
phrases.text_local: Le marché aux fleurs a lieu ici chaque matin ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh mar-SHAY oh FLUHR ah LYUH ee-SEE shahk mah-TEHN
phrases.cultural_note: The Place de l'Hôtel de Ville hosts a flower market Tuesday, Thursday, and Saturday mornings. It is one of the loveliest markets in Aix, with cut flowers, potted plants, and seasonal wreaths from local growers.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the Town Hall is open to visitors
phrases.cultural_note: The Hôtel de Ville (Town Hall) is a working municipal building. Some areas may be open during special events or heritage days.

responses.phonetic: suhl-MAHN pahn-DAHN lay zhoor-NAY doo pah-tree-MWAHN
responses.french: Seulement pendant les Journées du Patrimoine.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the clock tower chimes
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure sonne la tour de l'Horloge ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UHR son lah TOOR duh lor-LOHZH
phrases.cultural_note: The Tour de l'Horloge beside the Hôtel de Ville is a landmark of old Aix. It chimes on the hour.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tourist office is from here
phrases.text_local: L'office de tourisme est-il loin d'ici ?
phrases.pronunciation: loh-FEES duh too-REEZM eh-TEEL lwehn dee-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: The Aix-en-Provence tourist office is located on the Cours Mirabeau, just a short walk from the Place de l'Hôtel de Ville. Staff speak English and can provide the Cézanne trail map and current event listings.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are concerts or events this week
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des concerts ou des événements cette semaine ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL day kohn-SEHR oo day ay-vay-nuh-MAHN set suh-MEN
phrases.cultural_note: The Place de l'Hôtel de Ville hosts seasonal events and is one of the main stages for the Festival d'Aix-en-Provence in July.

responses.english: Check the programme at the tourist office.
responses.phonetic: vay-ree-FYAY luh proh-GRAM ah loh-FEES duh too-REEZM
responses.french: Vérifiez le programme à l'office de tourisme.
